message.content:
The page displays a design/branding document for the 'Wesal' social media platform, specifically page 3 of 15. The background color is a dark teal, with the hex code #004346. At the top left, the word "Color" is prominently displayed in a light, soft blue-gray font. Below this heading, three rounded rectangular color swatches are arranged horizontally, each with a distinct fill color and a dark gray text label showing the hex code of the color. 

The first swatch on the left has a medium blue fill color with the hex code #004346, the second swatch in the middle has a light blue fill color with the hex code #508991, and the third swatch on the right has a very light, off-white or cream fill color with the hex code #172A3A. Each swatch has rounded corners and a thin, dark gray border. The layout is clean and minimalistic, with ample spacing between the swatches and the heading. There are no additional decorative elements, icons, or logos present on the page.
